name: Total Vengeance
short_description: After a heist gone wrong, you’re stranded in a deserted part of town with a strange secret. Survive the hunt, expose the truth, and outrun the darkness.
detailed_description:
"Total Vengeance" throws you into a relentless survival horror experience where every step could be your last. Stranded after a botched heist, you’ll battle bloodthirsty wolves, grotesque monsters, and the creeping dread of the unknown. Scavenge for supplies, solve deadly puzzles, and fight to reunite with your partner all while uncovering the dark secrets lurking in the shadows.

Key Features:

  • Survival Horror at its Core – Face relentless threats where every bullet and breath counts.

  • Exploration & Resource Management – Scavenge supplies, manage inventory, and make life-or-death decisions.

  • Terrifying Enemies – From savage wolves to nightmarish monsters, danger stalks every step.

  • Atmospheric Environments – Explore eerie forests, dark interiors, and tense open spaces.
